title: Otis Makes Yummy Sounds
synopsis: Little Otis explores different foods and the fun sounds they make when he eats them. From crunchy apples to squishy bananas, each bite creates a delightful sound that babies will love to imitate.

pages.text: Otis is hungry. Time to eat!

illustration.description: A cheerful toddler boy with warm brown skin and curly black hair sits in a bright yellow high chair. He wears a soft blue bib and claps his small hands with excitement. The kitchen background shows pastel green cabinets and a sunny window. His dark eyes sparkle with anticipation.
illustration.alt: Happy toddler Otis in high chair ready to eat

illustration.description: Otis holds a bright red apple slice in his tiny hands, taking a big bite. His cheeks puff out slightly as he chews. Apple juice glistens on his chin. The background shows soft peach tones with floating apple slices creating a dreamy pattern.
illustration.alt: Otis eating crunchy apple with happy expression

illustration.description: Otis squeezes a peeled yellow banana between his fingers, giggling as it mushes. Banana pieces stick to his hands and bib. His expression shows pure delight. The background features soft yellow and cream watercolor washes with gentle banana shapes floating around.
illustration.alt: Otis playing with squishy banana pieces

illustration.description: Otis carefully holds a small spoon with orange soup, making slurping sounds. Some soup drips from the spoon onto his bib. His grandmother, an elderly Black woman with gray braids and kind eyes, sits beside him smiling warmly. The background shows a cozy kitchen with soft orange hues.
illustration.alt: Otis slurping soup with grandmother nearby

illustration.description: Otis pops small blueberries into his mouth one by one, his eyes wide with wonder. Purple juice stains his lips and fingers. Colorful berries are scattered on his high chair tray. The background features soft purple and blue watercolor swirls with berry patterns.
illustration.alt: Otis eating blueberries that pop in his mouth

illustration.description: Otis holds a round cracker and takes a big bite, creating crumbs that fall onto his tray. His father, a Latino man with short black hair and a gentle smile, watches from nearby. The background shows warm tan and golden tones with floating cracker shapes.
illustration.alt: Otis munching crackers while father watches

illustration.description: Otis tilts his sippy cup and drinks milk, making satisfied gulping sounds. A white milk mustache forms above his upper lip. His eyes close contentedly as he drinks. The background features soft white and cream tones with gentle cloud-like shapes floating around.
illustration.alt: Otis drinking milk with a milk mustache

pages.text: Mmm, mmm! Otis is happy and full!

illustration.description: Otis leans back in his high chair with a satisfied smile, patting his round little belly. His face and bib show traces of all his foods - apple juice, banana bits, and crumbs. His whole family stands around him smiling. The background glows with warm golden light and heart shapes.
illustration.alt: Happy, full Otis surrounded by loving family

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the apple make?
questions.explanation: The apple makes a crunchy sound when Otis bites it!

questions.question: Who sits with Otis during soup time?
questions.explanation: Grandmother sits beside Otis while he eats his soup.

questions.question: What happens after Otis drinks milk?
questions.explanation: Otis gets a white milk mustache after drinking his milk!

pages.text: Mmm, mmm! Otis is happy and _____!
